home.title: Behbehani Motors — Buy, Sell & Own a Car in Kuwait
home.metaDescription: Kuwait's trusted online marketplace for buying, selling, financing and servicing cars. 71-point inspected. Home delivery. 3-day return.

buy.sub: Kuwait's all-in-one marketplace, connecting buyers with their dream cars and sellers with the perfect platform to showcase their offerings.

inspect.sub: Certified technicians inspect every car before it lists. Reserve in minutes, test-drive at home, and return within 3 days for a full refund.

finance.eyebrow: Real bank offers, no impact on credit
finance.sub: Compare APRs side-by-side, pick the best monthly payment and e-sign your contract online. No paperwork, no branch visits.

brands.title: Find your dream brand
brands.sub: Hand-picked inventory from the top brands sold in Kuwait.

sell.title: Three ways to sell. Pick what suits you.

instant.title: Instant Online Valuation
instant.sub: 60 seconds. Guaranteed offer valid for 7 days.

concierge.title: Concierge Service
concierge.sub: We inspect, photograph, price and sell — for you.

self.title: Self-Service Classified
self.sub: Post your own listing. Get leads in 24 hours.

how.title: From browse to driveway in days, not weeks.

reserve.title: Reserve
reserve.sub: Hold any car for 48 hours with a refundable KWD 100 deposit.

finance.title: Finance & sign
finance.sub: Get bank offers and e-sign your contract online.

delivered.title: Delivered
delivered.sub: We deliver to your door. Track the driver in real time.

services.title: Everything your car needs, in one place.

items.fatima: Reserved on Friday, delivered Sunday. The inspection report saved me from a bad car my cousin recommended.
items.mohammad: Bank offers in 6 minutes, all online. Picked Burgan with 4.6% APR. No paperwork.
items.sara: I sold my old Audi via Concierge and bought a BMW the same week. They handled the MOI transfer too.

sell.metaTitle: Sell your car in Kuwait — Behbehani Motors
sell.metaDescription: Choose Concierge (we handle everything) or Self-service (you stay in control). 71-point inspection, guaranteed payment and MOI transfer included.

hero.sub: Choose our expert full-service concierge approach, or take full control and sell it yourself. Either way — best price, no hassle.

brands.title: Start with your car brand
brands.sub: Click your brand to begin. Don't see it? Choose 'Other'.
brands.dealerBundles: Selling more than one car? See dealer bundles

how.title: Two ways to sell your car
how.sub: Pick the experience that suits you — full-service or full-control.

concierge.step1Sub: Our certified technician arrives at your location for a 71-point inspection and professional photography.
concierge.step2Sub: Within 24–48 hours, you'll get competitive cash offers from our network of verified buyers.
concierge.step3Sub: Accept your favourite offer and we handle payment, ownership transfer and paperwork the same day.

self.step1Sub: Upload photos, specs and an honest condition description. Listing goes live within 24 hours of review.
self.step2Sub: Buyers reach you through our masked-number system. Negotiate, schedule viewings, pick your price.
self.step3Sub: Close the deal yourself or upgrade to Concierge midway if you'd rather not handle the closing.

compare.title: Choose the service that works for you
compare.sub: Side-by-side breakdown of what each option includes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before selling.
faq.q1: What options do you offer for selling my car?
faq.a1: We offer two flexible options: a Concierge Service where our team handles the entire selling process, and Self-Service where you maintain full control using our platform.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of the Concierge service?
faq.a2: Our experienced team handles everything: 71-point inspection at your doorstep, professional photography, smart pricing, marketing, buyer inquiries, negotiation, payment and MOI ownership transfer.
faq.q3: How long does it take to sell my car?
faq.a3: Through Concierge, the average time from inspection to closed deal is 7 days. Self-Service is typically 14–30 days depending on your asking price and demand.
faq.q4: What if my car has issues or damage?
faq.a4: No problem — we sell cars in all conditions. The inspection report will accurately reflect the condition, and pricing is adjusted accordingly.
faq.a5: Concierge: zero upfront — we only earn a commission when your car sells. Self-Service: a small KWD 10 listing fee for 30 days of visibility.
faq.q6: What if my Civil ID transfer takes longer?
faq.a6: Most MOI ownership transfers complete the same day. If yours takes longer due to a backlog at MOI, our team keeps the file open at no extra cost until the Civil ID transfer clears.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to get the best market price for your car?
ctaBanner.sub: Join thousands of customers who chose the smarter way to sell.

help.title: Our expert team is ready to help you.
help.sub: Reach out via WhatsApp, phone or email — whichever works best for you.

conciergeSuccess.step1: An advisor calls or WhatsApps you within 2 hours to confirm the exact time.
conciergeSuccess.step2: Your certified inspector arrives at the address and runs the 71-point inspection (~60 min).
conciergeSuccess.step3: You receive a signed PDF report. We text you a secure link to sign on your phone.
conciergeSuccess.step4: After signing, you receive a guaranteed cash offer within 24 hours.
